suite.name: Auth

kw.name: Open Application
kw.doc: Opens a new application to given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.1/cli/args/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | no | alias | | strict_ssl | No | allows you to send commands to an invalid certificate host like a self-signed one. |

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Execution terminated by signal

test.name: [TC-0001] User Should Register Successfully With Valid Email And Name
test.doc: Register with valid email and name → navigate to HomeScreen
test.status: Test execution stopped due to a fatal error.

kw.name: Close Application
kw.doc: Closes the current application and also close webdriver session.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: No application is open

suite.doc: [PBI-0001] User Authentication Feature Test suite for Register, Login with Token, Toggle mode, and Logout
suite.status:
Suite setup failed: Execution terminated by signal
Also suite teardown failed: No application is open

errors.msg: Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: Execution terminated by signal
Keyword 'Capture Page Screenshot' could not be run on failure: No application is open
